name: mikayum
description: MikaYum — bilingual maid cafe ordering system

scripts.build: npm --workspace apps/web run build && npm --workspace functions run build
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace apps/web run typecheck && npm --workspace functions run typecheck
scripts.dev:emulators: concurrently -n web,emu -c blue,green "npm run dev" "npm run emulators"
